state_analysis: We installed ImageMagick and checked for embedded metadata but found none. We still need to determine the position from the image. Rendering with chafa/img2txt was not sufficiently clear. We will try a higher fidelity terminal image viewer to make the board legible, then decide the best move and write it to /app/move.txt.
explanation: Install timg (a terminal image viewer), render the image at larger dimensions for clarity, and then, after identifying the best move(s) for White from the rendered board, write them to /app/move.txt.
